case_title: JAY W ENSLEY VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT COPR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-26-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-23-2013 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENSLEY, JAY W IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,515.00 FILED BY ENSLEY, JAY W AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENSLEY, JAY W AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "DENIED" BECAUSE: NO LEGAL REPRESENTATION REQUIRED OR PERMITTED IN SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT. THEREFORE, THE HEARING ON JAN-23-2013 AT 8:30 AM DEPT.#506 STILL STANDS. - PER JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SALVATORE RUSSO--PROPERTY SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY ENSLEY, JAY W AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
